info.english_meaning: to pleaseto love to show affection
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' prItiH tuzwiH  ' mutprItiH pramado harzaH ' iti amaraH  evaM sati akarmakaH  yaTA - Pala - mUlAdinA hariH prIyate  hfzyati ityarTaH  yadA tu prItiH tarpaRaM  prIY  tarpaRe iti krEyAdikAt ktini prItiSabdanizpattiH tadA tu sakarmakaH  prIyate = tarpayati ityarTaH  ' prIN prItO prIyateprIRAt prIRIte tarpaRe YitaH  aRO yO YittvasAPalyAt prIRayet prayate prayet ' (Slo. 19-20) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tAByaH sarvAH kalAH prAdAt pariprItA sarasvatI' (skanda pu0 kA0 46742) pariprItA'tyantaM prasannA
